info.title: Decathlon Smart Search API
info.description: AI-powered shopping search API using fine-tuned Qwen 3:4B. Understands natural language queries and returns personalized product recommendations with semantic search.

post.description: Complete AI-powered search: parses natural language query, executes hybrid search, and returns products with personalized recommendations.

query.description: Natural language search query (e.g. 'Horse riding boots for kids below 3000')

200.description: Search results with products and AI recommendations

apiKey.name: API-KEY
apiKey.description: API key for authentication (use hyphen, not underscore)
